extraction.one_line_summary: MARTIN SKI Tomasz won from breakaway while CONTADOR attacked Puerto del Garbiella 40km out, splitting favorites but gaining no time as chase groups reunited on descent
tactical_patterns: CONTADOR attacked Puerto del Garbiella 40km out forcing selection, but favorites' mutual marking on descent nullified the move completely.
Breakaway never exceeded 3 minutes despite 20 riders, suggesting peloton controlled tempo expecting late-race selection on Puerto del Garbiella.
VAN GARDEREN crashed in final kilometers yet lost only 17 seconds, indicating favorites' group fractured but didn't press advantages.
CHAVEZ and URÁN regained Contador group on descent after being dropped on climb, showing descending skills crucial for limiting losses.

rider_signals.CONTADOR Alberto: positive: animated Puerto del Garbiella climb with Tinkoff support, showing recovery from Andorra struggles but still 3+ minutes down overall
rider_signals.VAN GARDEREN Tejay: negative: dropped on Puerto del Garbiella climb then crashed in finale while holding 2nd GC, revealing fragility under pressure
rider_signals.FROOME Chris: neutral: followed Contador's attack successfully but conservative tactics suggest prioritizing time defense over aggressive racing
rider_signals.CHAVEZ Esteban: positive: dropped on climb but regained contact on descent, demonstrating technical descending can compensate for climbing weaknesses
